overview: This B/R/G Modern deck leverages cheap Goblin creatures alongside targeted discard and combat tricks to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize. By combining rapid board presence with hand disruption, it aims to dictate the pace and close games quickly.
win_conditions: Overwhelm with pumped Goblin tokens and creatures
Deplete opponent's hand via Conspicuous Snoop and Boggart Trawler death triggers
Push lethal damage using Birthing Ritual combat tricks

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more cheap Goblins
Birthing Ritual paired with a creature
mulligan_criteria: High mana curve with no early threats
Lack of interaction or board presence
Hands missing both discard and pump effects

early_game: Deploy low-cost Goblins to establish immediate pressure
Play Conspicuous Snoop or Boggart Trawler to force early discards
Hold up mana for potential combat tricks
mid_game: Use Birthing Ritual to pump attackers or block efficiently
Cycle through discard triggers to strip opponent's answers
Maintain board advantage while searching for finishers
late_game: Leverage accumulated board presence to close out the match
Use remaining discard effects to clear late-game threats
Push for lethal with maximized combat damage

key_cards.name: Birthing Ritual
key_cards.notes: Cast during combat to boost attackers or save blockers; synergizes with cheap Goblins to push lethal

key_cards.name: Conspicuous Snoop
key_cards.notes: Sacrifice or let it die to force opponent to discard, disrupting their game plan early

key_cards.name: Boggart Trawler
key_cards.notes: Provides early board presence and triggers discard on death, applying pressure while stripping resources

sequencing_tips: Prioritize playing discard creatures before pumping to maximize hand disruption
Save Birthing Ritual for combat tricks rather than static board states
Manage hand size carefully to avoid discarding key cards when multiple death triggers resolve

matchups.advice: Focus on stripping counterspells and removal via discard triggers, then push aggressive damage
Race the board while using discard to remove their key threats, prioritize blocking efficiently
Establish early pressure before they stabilize, use discard to delay their value engines

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Goblin archetype in Modern with Birthing Ritual, Conspicuous Snoop, Boggart Trawler

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Signature cards provide pump and discard effects

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Interaction between pump and discard mechanics in B/R/G Goblin lists

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Standard Modern threats relevant to aggressive discard strategies
